scope: rudder-induced SIROCCO current-heading/rudder force-component sweep at COG; ship-fixed X/Y/N components are derived by rotating local current-frame loads by heading offset; hull current loads, bank effect, tug loads, mooring-line stiffness, current-profile variation, and propeller race are excluded; no class compliance conclusion
method: V=kn*0.51444; F=beta*A_R*V^2*Cr; alpha=delta-psi; X_local=F*sin(alpha)^2; Y_local=F*sin(alpha)*cos(alpha); X_ship=X_local*cos(psi)-Y_local*sin(psi); Y_ship=X_local*sin(psi)+Y_local*cos(psi); N=Y_ship*yaw_lever
default_speed_policy: 4.56 kn is an extra chart-default case outside the requested engineering sweep list.
scope_exclusions: hull current loads, bank effect, tug loads, mooring-line stiffness, current-profile variation, and propeller race are excluded
oblique-current extension is a first-cut visualization using alpha = rudder angle - heading offset
not a validated oblique-current hull/rudder interaction model
Cr=1.0 is a neutral no-propeller-rotation correction value

force_convention.heading_positive: local downstream current-force axis rotated toward port from +X_ship
force_convention.transform: Local-to-ship transform rotates current-frame X/Y loads by heading offset into ship-fixed COG axes.

analysis_assumptions: Vessel is moored with ship speed over ground equal to 0 kn.
Heading/rudder effective-angle convention: alpha = rudder_angle_deg - heading_offset_deg.
Positive heading rotates the local downstream current-force axis toward port from +X_ship.
Local-to-ship transform rotates local current-frame X/Y loads into ship-fixed COG axes.
4.56 kn is an extra chart-default case outside the requested engineering sweep list.
Only rudder-induced COG force components are reported; hull current loads require vessel current coefficients.
Mooring reactions are equal and opposite loads for static-equilibrium context only.

sample_working_example.data_point: chart-default 4.56 kn, heading 0 deg, rudder +1 deg, Cr=1.0

summary.max_abs_ship_sway_case: current 4.56 kn, heading -10 deg, rudder 10 deg
summary.max_abs_yaw_case: current 4.56 kn, heading -10 deg, rudder 10 deg
summary.max_resultant_case: current 4.56 kn, heading -10 deg, rudder 10 deg
